//! This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
//! Structure: HashTableCompact
#![allow(non_camel_case_types)]
#![allow(unused_parens)]
#![allow(missing_docs)]
#![allow(unused_imports)]
#![allow(unused_variables)]
#![allow(unused_unsafe)]
use std::ptr;

fn Length(value: &str) -> i32 { value.len() as i32 }

fn ReadU8(value: &[u8], offset: usize) -> u32 { unsafe { *value.get_unchecked(offset) as u32 } }


pub struct fastdata;

struct E {
    key: &'static str,
    hash_code: u64,
}

impl fastdata {
    const BUCKET_STARTS: [u8; 3] = [
        0, 1, 3
    ];

    const BUCKET_COUNTS: [u8; 3] = [
        1, 2, 0
    ];

    const ENTRIES: [E; 3] = [
        E { hash_code: 9198652691199425319, key: "aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa" }, E { hash_code: 18225461187723808291, key: "a" }, E { hash_code: 16750939634977259983, key: "item" }
    ];

    #[inline]
    unsafe fn get_hash(value: &str, mut length: i32) -> u64 {
        let data = value.as_bytes();
        let mut offset: i32 = 0;
        let mut hash: u64 = 352654597;
        while ((length > 0))
        {
         hash = ((((hash << (5 as u32)) | (hash >> (27 as u32))).wrapping_add(hash)) ^ (ReadU8(data, offset as usize) as u64));
         offset += 1;
         length -= 1;
        }

        hash = ((352654597 as u64).wrapping_add((hash.wrapping_mul(1566083941))));

        return hash;
    }

    #[must_use]
    pub fn contains(key: &str) -> bool {
        let mut length: i32 = Length(key);

        let hash = unsafe { Self::get_hash(key, length) };
        let index = (hash % 3u64) as usize;
        let start = Self::BUCKET_STARTS[index] as usize;
        let count = Self::BUCKET_COUNTS[index] as usize;
        let end = start + count;

        for i in start..end {
            let entry = &Self::ENTRIES[i];
            if entry.hash_code == hash && entry.key == key {
                return true;
            }
        }

        false
    }

    pub const ITEM_COUNT: usize = 3;
    pub const MIN_KEY_LENGTH: i32 = 1;
    pub const MAX_KEY_LENGTH: i32 = 255;
    pub const HAS_NUMBER: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_UPPERCASE: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_LOWERCASE: bool = true;
    pub const HAS_SYMBOL: bool = false;
    pub const HAS_WHITESPACE: bool = false;
}
